phaseName: Phase 4: Wire Hardcoded Pages to Real Queries
goal: Replace all mock data with real query-driven data across ExplorePage, ProfilePage, LiveViewerPage, LiveHostPage, and ChatPage
summary: Phase 4 complete. All hardcoded data across five pages has been replaced with real queries or proper state. ExplorePage now uses useLiveStreams and usePlants. ProfilePage uses useProfilePlants, useFeedPosts, useFollows, and useLiveStreams. LiveViewerPage uses the new useStreamChat Supabase Realtime hook. LiveHostPage categories and settings are now controlled by typed useState. ChatPage ad placeholder removed.
stepSummaries:
1. ExplorePage: replace hardcoded live streams, plant directory, community highlights, and challenges with useLiveStreams / useFeedPosts / usePlants or other existing hooks [verified]
  2. ProfilePage: wire Plants/Posts/Connections/Lives tabs to usePlants / useFeedPosts / useFollows / useLiveStreams and remove static image imports [verified]
  3. LiveViewerPage: replace hardcoded chatMessages and reactions with useMessages or useStream realtime data [verified]
  4. LiveHostPage: replace static categories array with state or data from an existing hook; replace static control strings with real state values [verified]
  5. ChatPage: remove the rooting hormone sponsored tip placeholder [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: All 5 steps completed with diffs: ExplorePage removed mock arrays and wired useLiveStreams/usePlants; ProfilePage removed 8 static image imports and wired useProfilePlants/useFeedPosts/useFollows/useLiveStreams; LiveViewerPage added useStreamChat and removed hardcoded chatMessages/reactions; LiveHostPage converted categories to typed state and added useState for settings; ChatPage removed rooting hormone ad placeholder.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Each step had real behavioral changes verified by diff, grep, ESLint, and tsc. Step 1 (ExplorePage) and Step 2 (ProfilePage) had substantial query wiring. Step 3 (LiveViewerPage) added a new Supabase Realtime hook. Step 4 (LiveHostPage) converted static UI to interactive state. Step 5 (ChatPage) removed ad placeholder.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Phase goal 'Replace all mock data with real query-driven data across ExplorePage, ProfilePage, LiveViewerPage, LiveHostPage, and ChatPage' is fully met. Every page identified in PAGE_INVENTORY.md as having hardcoded data has been addressed.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All five pages in Phase 4 scope now use real data or proper state management. No mock/sample arrays remain in any of these files.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Nothing was deferred. All hardcoded data issues across the five pages were fully resolved in this phase.
gateVerdicts.rationale: No items were left undone. Every planned wiring task is complete and verified.
